text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But I know I gave it everything I got, so no regrets
here.
choice_data_list: I'm relieved that you're not feeling down.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... But there are some things I need to reflect
on.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I was overwhelmed by everyone else's intensity
and lost... This just goes to show I still lack
experience.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I don't think I was less focused on winning than
the others, but it's still pretty frustrating!
choice_data_list:
You can take all that energy and pour it into
the next race.

Let’s use that feeling as a springboard to future
success!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, yeah! I can feel power welling up inside me
again!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Haha, that's pretty amazing. It must be because
of your help, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's giving me another kind of strength, different
from what my muscles give me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I'll put that power to good work next time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So... please keep on training me to be the best I
can!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yeah! All right, now I'm feeling inspired!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I can't keep on losing. Next time, I really wanna
win!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Then it looks like we both know what needs
to be done.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Will you spot me again, just like always?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Fist bump! Yeah, that's what I'm talking about!
